calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR
EXAMINER: EDWARD MIYAUCHI

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
TENTATIVE RULING: Grant without hearing.
EXAMINER: EDWARD MIYAUCHI

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 17, 2019 is admitted to probate. Kalpana Pradeep Gandhi is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 29, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Shirly Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Continued To Sep-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anastasios G. Konstantin for petitioner Kalpana Pradeep Gandhi (via Zoom).

The matter came on for hearing on the petition for probate of will and letters testamentary.

The Court inquired whether petitioner's client was present on Zoom to verify the information addressed in the tentative ruling, but counsel explained he had not been able to arrange for their appearance.

At counsel's request, the Court continued the matter to September 24, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow submission of verification and resolution of remaining issues before admission of the will.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
